description: TechCase MVP search evaluation dataset based on articles collected from AWS technology blog RSS feeds.

queries.intent: AWS Lambda가 실제로 어떤 서버리스/관측성/고성능 워크로드 사례에 사용되는지 찾는다.

expectedResults.title: Streaming CloudWatch metrics to VPC-based OpenTelemetry collectors using Lambda
Building Memory-Intensive Apps with AWS Lambda Managed Instances
Best practices for Lambda durable functions using a fraud detection example

queries.intent: DynamoDB 마이그레이션, 데이터 export, 분석 연동 사례를 찾는다.

expectedResults.title: Zero-downtime DynamoDB construct migration: from Table to TableV2 with cdk orphan
Filter, transform, and load your DynamoDB table exports using AWS Glue
Improve DynamoDB analytics with AWS Glue zero-ETL schema and partition controls

queries.intent: Amazon EKS 운영, 환경 프로비저닝, 이벤트 대응 사례를 찾는다.

expectedResults.title: Deloitte optimizes EKS environment provisioning and achieves 89% faster testing environments using Amazon EKS and vCluster
How Generali Malaysia optimizes operations with Amazon EKS
AI-powered event response for Amazon EKS

queries.intent: OpenSearch가 검색, 관측성, 데이터 통합, 복원력 구성에 쓰인 사례를 찾는다.

expectedResults.title: How to build a cross-Region resilience for Amazon OpenSearch Service with Amazon MSK
